stories.blurb_en:
Rhode Island Governor McKee signed three AI laws on June 25, including a ban on any AI system that simulates emotional attachment or performs the role of therapist.
• The law prohibits AI from acting as a mental health counselor — if your app's companion feature offers to “be there for you,” that’s now a legal liability in Rhode Island.
• Failing to route a suicidal user to a crisis service: $15,000 per day, per incident.
• AI recording of clinical therapy sessions now requires explicit disclosure before the session begins.
• Pennsylvania sued Character.AI earlier this year for similar conduct; Rhode Island made it a statute before the lawsuits had time to stack up.
• The bill defines the problem with unusual precision: “simulating emotional attachment” as a prohibited category — which covers the product roadmaps of several well-funded startups.
• For consumer device makers: AI-powered “companion” or “creator coach” features are entering an environment where disclosure requirements and liability floors are actively being legislated, state by state.
stories.blurb_zh:
罗德岛州长麦基于6月25日签署三项AI法律，其中包括禁止任何AI系统模拟情感依附关系或充当心理治疗师的法规。
• 法律明确禁止AI担任心理健康顾问——如果你的陪伴类应用功能声称“我会一直陪着你”，这在罗德岛州现在是法律风险。
• 未能将有自杀倾向的用户转介至危机服务：每日每例罚款1.5万美元。
• AI记录临床治疗会话现在必须在会话开始前明确告知用户。
• 宾夕法尼亚州今年早些时候已就类似行为起诉Character.AI；罗德岛在诉讼还未堆积之前，直接立法了。
• 法律将“模拟情感依附”作为明确的禁止类别——这正是几家高估值初创公司的核心产品路线图。
• 对消费电子和相机厂商：带有AI“陪伴”或“创作助手”功能的产品，正进入一个各州逐步建立披露要求和责任底线的监管环境。
stories.verification_notes: Confirmed via Transparency Coalition AI (June 25), Rhode Island Current, AI Weekly. Governor McKee signing of three AI laws on June 25 corroborated across sources. $15K/day fine for failure to route suicidal users confirmed. Character.AI Pennsylvania lawsuit referenced as precedent context.

stories.blurb_en:
Insta360 launched the Luna Ultra on June 10 — a $769.99 gimbal camera co-engineered with Leica, featuring a 1-inch 8K sensor, lossless 6x zoom, and an onboard Triple AI Chip that handles tracking, subject recognition, and stabilization simultaneously at 60fps.
• This is the Leica collaboration made hardware: Leica Summicron optics, co-engineered from the ground up — not a badge licensing deal.
• Specs: 8Kp30 Dolby Vision, 10-bit I-Log, 14 stops of dynamic range, ACES color workflow, 37MP stills, 200MP panoramas.
• The telephoto module is a 1/1.3-inch sensor at F2.0; total reach is 12x zoom (6x lossless optical, 6x digital).
• Three Leica color profiles: Natural, Vivid, and Chrome — the same tuning language Leica shooters already know.
• Detachable 2-inch OLED touchscreen; two colorways: Cosmic Black and Stellar White.
• The Triple AI Chip is the quiet headline: tracking, recognition, and stabilization at 60fps, all on-device, all simultaneously — this is what “AI at the edge” looks like when a camera company treats it as a first-class engineering problem.
• Available now at $769.99 — which is not Leica pricing.
stories.blurb_zh:
Insta360于6月10日发布Luna Ultra——一款售价769.99美元、与徕卡联合研发的云台相机，搭载1英寸8K传感器、无损6倍光学变焦，以及同时处理追踪、识别与防抖的三重AI芯片，全程60fps机内运算。
• 这是真正意义上的徕卡联名硬件：徕卡Summicron镜头从立项起就联合开发，不是贴牌授权。
• 规格一览：8K 30fps Dolby Vision、10-bit I-Log、14档动态范围、ACES色彩工作流、3700万像素照片、2亿像素全景。
• 长焦模块采用1/1.3英寸传感器，F2.0光圈；总计12倍变焦，其中6倍为无损光学变焦。
• 三款徕卡色彩模式：Natural（自然）、Vivid（鲜艳）、Chrome（经典）——徕卡用户熟悉的调色语言。
• 可拆卸2英寸OLED触摸屏；两款配色：Cosmic Black（宇宙黑）与Stellar White（星际白）。
• 三重AI芯片是真正的核心看点：以60fps同时运行追踪、主体识别与光学防抖，全程在机内完成——这是相机公司把“边缘AI”当一等工程课题来做的样子。
• 现已开放预购，售价769.99美元——这不是徕卡的定价逻辑。
stories.verification_notes: Confirmed via PetaPixel (June 10), DPReview (June 10), multiple imaging outlets. 1-inch 8K sensor, Leica Summicron co-engineering, Triple AI Chip, $769.99 pricing, 8Kp30 Dolby Vision, 10-bit I-Log, 14 stops DR, ACES color, 37MP stills, 200MP panoramas, 12x zoom (6x lossless), detachable 2-inch OLED, three Leica color profiles all confirmed. 18 days old but included as exceptionally significant for Insta360 employee audience.

stories.blurb_en:
California’s AB 2148 amends the state education code to define “teacher” as “a natural person” — legally barring AI from serving as the teacher of record — and was sent to Governor Newsom on June 24 after passing both chambers unanimously (Assembly 76-0, Senate 38-0).
• The amendment is three words. The implications are not: it triggers existing licensing, liability, and collective bargaining protections the moment an AI tries to lead a class.
• AI in the classroom as a tool remains legal. AI as the teacher, billing by the hour, is not.
• Newsom has vetoed other AI bills; a 114-0 combined vote makes that considerably harder to justify.
• Character.AI, Khanmigo, and the broader AI tutoring market just found out where the ceiling is — and it’s the front of the room.
• The practical impact lands on EdTech companies marketing “AI teachers” to cash-strapped districts — that pitch now runs into a statutory wall in the biggest U.S. state market.
• Bills like this one don’t stop AI from reshaping education; they route it. The question is whether that routing leads to better tools or just better lawyers.
stories.blurb_zh:
加州AB 2148将教育法规中“教师”的定义修改为“自然人”——从法律层面禁止AI担任授课教师——该法案以全票（众议院76比0、参议院38比0）通过两院，于6月24日送交州长纽森签署。
• 修改只有三个字。但影响不止三个字：一旦AI试图“主导课堂”，现有的教师资质认证、法律责任和集体谈判保护条款将自动触发。
• AI作为课堂工具依然合法。AI作为授课主体、按课时计费，则不行。
• 纽森曾否决过多项AI法案；但对一个114比0的全票结果说“不”，需要更充分的理由。
• Character.AI、Khanmigo以及整个AI辅导行业刚刚搞清楚上限在哪里——就在教室的讲台前。
• 实际冲击落在那些向资金紧张学区推销“AI教师”方案的教育科技公司身上——这个卖点在美国最大的州市场遇到了法律硬墙。
• 这类法案不会阻止AI重塑教育，只是改变了方向。问题是，这个方向最终造就更好的工具，还是更多律师。
stories.verification_notes: Confirmed via Transparency Coalition AI (June 26), California legislative tracker. AB 2148 passage dates: Assembly 76-0 (May 4), Senate 38-0 (June 18), sent to governor June 24. Bill amends education code to define 'teacher' as 'natural person'. Not yet signed as of June 28.
